ADD.finding: POST /api/v1/cart/items endpoint lacks detailed specification including default quantity behavior (quantity: 1)
ADD.lld_current_state: Section 5.3.2 mentions endpoint but details omitted
ADD.required_action: Add complete API specification with request schema, response schema, default quantity=1 behavior, validation rules, and error responses

ADD.finding: GET /api/v1/cart endpoint lacks specification for returning individual subtotals and cart total
ADD.story_requirement_reference: api_contracts_required: GET /api/v1/cart (Retrieve items, individual subtotals, and cart total)
ADD.lld_current_state: Section 5.3.1 mentions endpoint but response schema details omitted
ADD.required_action: Add complete response schema showing items array with individual subtotals and cart total calculation

ADD.finding: Automatic recalculation logic for subtotal and total upon quantity mutation is not documented
ADD.story_requirement_reference: business_logic_rules: Automatic recalculation of subtotal and total upon any quantity mutation
ADD.lld_current_state: Section 4.3 mentions 'Price calculations' but no detailed recalculation logic
ADD.required_action: Add detailed business logic specification for automatic recalculation triggered by quantity changes, including calculation formulas and update sequence

ADD.finding: Empty cart state handling and UI redirection logic ('continue shopping' link) is not documented
ADD.story_requirement_reference: business_logic_rules: Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link)
ADD.lld_current_state: No mention of empty cart state handling in LLD
ADD.required_action: Add business logic specification for empty cart detection and response structure to trigger UI redirection with 'continue shopping' link

ADD.finding: CartItem entity specification missing required fields: Product Reference, Quantity, and current Price Snapshot
ADD.story_requirement_reference: data_model_impact: CartItem (Entity containing Product Reference, Quantity, and current Price Snapshot)
ADD.required_action: Add complete CartItem entity schema with fields: product_reference (FK), quantity (integer), price_snapshot (decimal), and relationships

MODIFY.finding: PUT /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoint specification incomplete - missing quantity update validation and recalculation trigger details
MODIFY.lld_current_state: Section 5.3.3 mentions endpoint but lacks detailed specification
MODIFY.required_modification: Enhance specification to include quantity validation rules, recalculation trigger, request/response schemas, and error handling

MODIFY.finding: DELETE /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoint specification incomplete - missing recalculation trigger and empty cart state handling
MODIFY.lld_current_state: Section 5.3.4 mentions endpoint but lacks detailed specification
MODIFY.current_implementation: Endpoint listed without complete behavior specification
MODIFY.required_modification: Enhance specification to include recalculation trigger after deletion and empty cart state detection logic

MODIFY.finding: ShoppingCart entity specification incomplete - missing explicit binding to user session or ID
MODIFY.story_requirement_reference: data_model_impact: ShoppingCart (Entity bound to user session or ID)
MODIFY.current_implementation: Database design section present but schema details omitted
MODIFY.required_modification: Complete ShoppingCart entity schema with explicit user_id or session_id binding, relationships to CartItem, and lifecycle management

recommendations.recommendation: Complete all API specifications in section 5.3 with full request/response schemas, validation rules, and business logic integration points before backend implementation begins
Expand section 6.2 Database Design to include complete ShoppingCart and CartItem entity schemas with all required fields and relationships
Add detailed business logic documentation for automatic recalculation and empty cart state handling in section 4.3 Cart Service

Consider adding a new section for Frontend Component specifications to cover presentation layer needs (Cart View Interface, Empty Cart View, Add to Cart Handler, Quantity Updater Component) or reference separate frontend design document

compliance_notes: LLD provides foundational structure for Cart APIs and service design but lacks implementation-ready detail required by Story SCRUM-1140. All 4 API endpoints are present but require specification completion. Data model section exists but details are omitted. Business logic rules are partially covered. Frontend components are out of scope for this LLD.
